D3_正式规则码总表与判定说明书.md
D13_公开可查边界能力清单.md
D6_字段策略字典与客户交付字段规范.md

notes: This is the first machine-readable core package for pre-code readiness.
The package freezes minimum stable contracts and is intended to be extended in later rounds rather than replaced.
Any implementation must consume these catalogs without creating a second vocabulary.
metadata.scope: formal objects and their minimum stable contract surface

hard_constraints: must not directly form business conclusions
must freeze unification strategy and review lane before stage 2
must freeze source registry and route policy before stage 2
carrier_type must be authoritative on H-01 and must not be recomputed from raw stage2 input
not a URL list; it is a statutory public disclosure judgement object
must carry fixation and first-seen/last-retrieved metadata before stage 3
route decision, fallback, downgrade and review signals must be machine-readable on public_chain before stage 3
multi-clock conflicts must not be collapsed into a single window
clock_conflict_state must be produced by stage 2 before stage 3
clock_resolution_rule_id and optional action deadline fields form the minimum authoritative clock baseline for downstream reference
unresolved multi-version conflicts block formal unification
version_chain_strategy must remain machine-readable so route baseline does not overstate multi-version maturity
must be generated after stage2 formal objects and before any stage3 formal parse
must express whether stage3 parse is allowed without relying on temporary analysis-plan.json files
must keep customer_visible_allowed=false and no_legal_conclusion=true
stage 3 truth object must not be replaced by a second portrait model
stage 4 and later consumers must consume stage 3 project_base rather than recompute parsed project truth
unresolved stage 3 truth or review path keeps downstream verification in review/block rather than silent success

downstream_consumers: all objects that consume key extracted fields
hard_constraints: key fields without slice ref, normalization rule id, or confidence cannot enter the formal chain
lineage_status may only become NORMALIZED when version_conflict_state=CONSISTENT
Stage3 truth layer ownership for normalization, conflict, unresolved, and review path remains in field_lineage_record
conflict_state=CONFLICTING or UNRESOLVED must produce a review/block path before Stage4 verification can pass
normalization and conflict carrier fields must remain in field_lineage_record and must not be regenerated by Stage4+ consumers
candidate rank or order must not be fabricated
bidder_candidate is a candidate-collection member and cannot be treated as the only candidate truth carrier
candidate collection, source lineage, conflict group, and review path metadata must remain Stage3 truth-layer data for downstream read-only consumption
only public consistency information may be consumed; visibility-review social insurance data is forbidden in formal public chain
attack surface must not be treated as a terminal illegality conclusion
verification_state must be PASS before rule_hit or project_fact consumption
only publicly auditable objects may be verified here
verification_state must be PASS before rule_hit eligibility
conservative filtering and review input only
evidence grade is a gating prerequisite, not a comment field
cannot be upgraded without evidence and dual gates
rule_hit_state must be READY_FOR_GATE before rule_gate_decision evaluation
rule_hit_state=CONFIRMED requires rule_gate_status=PASS and evidence_gate_status=PASS
rule_hit_state=SUPERSEDED must be excluded from project_fact
screenshots/OCR/model summaries cannot alone serve as primary evidence
retrieval_readiness_status must be READY before evidence_gate_decision PASS
must not be disguised as an established conclusion
must operate together with evidence_gate_decision
must operate together with rule_gate_decision
the only formal unified fact hub
must not be generated without regime, time window and competent authority boundary
all constrained review must enter a formal queue
review_queue_bucket reprioritization must retain review_lane and audit trail
formal reports must consume project_fact
review_task_status must be APPROVED before report_status=ISSUED
review_task_status=SUPERSEDED must map to report_status=REVOKED
report_status=REVOKED blocks delivery and leadpack use
cannot be replaced by a temporary competitor tag or list
must keep TopN/ranking/winning selection as a formal carrier rather than free trace only
winning challenger reference must stay aligned with the stage7 commercial chain
answers who is most likely to lawfully initiate formal action
answers who is most likely to approve purchase/payment
cannot exist before unified fact is formed
fit does not replace actor objects
fit does not replace actor objects
must match opportunity grade and time window
must not be generated from a single rule, announcement, or sales note
carries account and organization context only
must formalize candidate pool, winning candidate and reselection history before contact_target is finalized
must remain internal governed carrier and not bypass compliance or approval gates
winning contact selection and reselection trace must not remain runtime-only free text
must keep winning candidate aligned with contact_candidate_collection
may only come from public, authorized or compliant integrated sources
missing source vendor or trace fields must keep the object in review-only or blocked state
upstream opportunity_id and saleability_status must stay aligned with stage7 saleable_opportunity
priority and conflict fields are internal-only and must not bypass the formal compliance gate
cannot be generated if channel rules do not pass
non-preview execution may not proceed without execution trace and vendor audit fields
approval/writeback control fields must not be inferred only at runtime
governed preview metadata must be persisted on the formal plan object, not only in transient trace
without touch_record it is invalid to claim contact has occurred
records missing execution trace or vendor response ref must not count as formal execution evidence
failed touches must retain typed next-step/writeback state before closure
touch_record must persist governed writeback metadata for stage7/stage9 consumers even in preview mode
oral status is not a substitute
must persist H-08 preview/writeback state when provided
must remain internal governed skeleton and not imply live order execution
oral status is not a substitute
payment completion requires typed proof state and refund/exception persistence
payer/amount match workflow must be typed rather than inferred from free text
CHARGEBACK_REVIEW and other formal payment exceptions must be runtime-consumable and publish exception-specific writeback targets
must not rewrite stage 3 truth
delivery exception projections must remain typed and review/block closure when unresolved
customer ack, retrieval and archive states must remain governed internal only
PARTIAL_DELIVERY / DELIVERY_REJECTED / ACK_TIMEOUT must be runtime-consumable and publish exception-specific writeback targets
false positives and lost deals must be formally persisted
writeback targets must align with taxonomy and governance trigger requirements
H-08 feedback_reason and written_back_at_optional must be consumable when present
outcome writeback targets remain authoritative; governance/payment/delivery additive targets must be expressed by formal writeback contract rather than silent override
governance outcomes must not remain only in notes
trigger/action/writeback fields must stay typed and governed
writeback_target_contracts must distinguish persisted Stage9 objects from trace-only or projected targets
must not silently flow into the public formal chain
may only limit or delay capability; must not elevate forbidden inputs
required when model output enters the formal chain
provider metadata and provider trace are mandatory when model output is eligible to enter the formal chain
must not directly form business conclusions
must align with formal project identity policy
must not override formal clock_chain_profile
fixation bundle must be traceable and auditable
